title: meliosma henryi subsp. thorelii
intro: Meliosma henryi subsp. thorelii, also known as the Thoreli's meliosma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Calycanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Meliosma henryi subsp. thorelii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions, and its leaves and roots can be dried or used fresh to create teas or tinctures.
